commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Wilderness, which Moses commonly calls the salt sea, (on account of the asphalte with which it abounds,) or the sea of Araba, as it lies at the extremity of the plains of Moab, which are sometimes called Araboth, "deserts "because they were more fit for pasturage than for ploughing. (Calmet)
